inputs.issue: Add a --json flag to the status command. Acceptance: existing text output unchanged; new flag emits valid JSON; tests cover both paths.

expected_outputs.patch:
diff --git a/cli/status.py b/cli/status.py
@@ add --json flag and JSON renderer @@
expected_outputs.pr_summary: Adds a --json flag to the status command. Changed files: cli/status.py, tests/test_status.py. Tests: 12 passed. Scope held to the frozen acceptance criteria.

notes: Takes a scoped issue to a branch, passing checks, and a draft PR summary citing changed files.
